verses.text: Jesus leaves Judea for Galilee, knowing the Pharisees' notice. Wise withdrawal. He avoids needless conflict to do His work.
Jesus leaves Judea for Galilee, knowing the Pharisees' notice. Wise withdrawal. He avoids needless conflict to do His work.
Jesus leaves Judea for Galilee, knowing the Pharisees' notice. Wise withdrawal. He avoids needless conflict to do His work.
He must go through Samaria; wearied, He sits by Jacob's well at noon. Truly human. The Son of God knows weariness and thirst.
He must go through Samaria; wearied, He sits by Jacob's well at noon. Truly human. The Son of God knows weariness and thirst.
He must go through Samaria; wearied, He sits by Jacob's well at noon. Truly human. The Son of God knows weariness and thirst.
A woman comes to draw; 'if thou knewest the gift of God... thou wouldest have asked... living water.' Offered grace. He turns a request for water into an offer of life.
A woman comes to draw; 'if thou knewest the gift of God... thou wouldest have asked... living water.' Offered grace. He turns a request for water into an offer of life.
A woman comes to draw; 'if thou knewest the gift of God... thou wouldest have asked... living water.' Offered grace. He turns a request for water into an offer of life.
A woman comes to draw; 'if thou knewest the gift of God... thou wouldest have asked... living water.' Offered grace. He turns a request for water into an offer of life.
The water He gives 'shall be... a well of water springing up into everlasting life'; whoso drinks shall never thirst. Inward spring. Christ satisfies the soul for ever.
The water He gives 'shall be... a well of water springing up into everlasting life'; whoso drinks shall never thirst. Inward spring. Christ satisfies the soul for ever.

Give me this water; 'go, call thy husband'; thou hast had five, and he thou hast is not. Sin exposed. He gently uncovers her need before He heals it.
Give me this water; 'go, call thy husband'; thou hast had five, and he thou hast is not. Sin exposed. He gently uncovers her need before He heals it.

Give me this water; 'go, call thy husband'; thou hast had five, and he thou hast is not. Sin exposed. He gently uncovers her need before He heals it.
She owns Him a prophet; salvation 'is of the Jews'; ye worship ye know not what. True religion. Worship must rest on knowledge, not guesswork.
She owns Him a prophet; salvation 'is of the Jews'; ye worship ye know not what. True religion. Worship must rest on knowledge, not guesswork.
She owns Him a prophet; salvation 'is of the Jews'; ye worship ye know not what. True religion. Worship must rest on knowledge, not guesswork.
She owns Him a prophet; salvation 'is of the Jews'; ye worship ye know not what. True religion. Worship must rest on knowledge, not guesswork.
The Father seeks worshippers 'in spirit and in truth'; 'God is a Spirit.' Heart worship. God is honoured by the spirit, not by place alone.
The Father seeks worshippers 'in spirit and in truth'; 'God is a Spirit.' Heart worship. God is honoured by the spirit, not by place alone.
She speaks of Messias; 'I that speak unto thee am he.' Self-revealed. To a Samaritan woman He plainly owns He is the Christ.
She speaks of Messias; 'I that speak unto thee am he.' Self-revealed. To a Samaritan woman He plainly owns He is the Christ.
She leaves her waterpot, 'Come, see a man, which told me all... is not this the Christ?' Eager witness. Grace received makes her a herald at once.
She leaves her waterpot, 'Come, see a man, which told me all... is not this the Christ?' Eager witness. Grace received makes her a herald at once.
She leaves her waterpot, 'Come, see a man, which told me all... is not this the Christ?' Eager witness. Grace received makes her a herald at once.
She leaves her waterpot, 'Come, see a man, which told me all... is not this the Christ?' Eager witness. Grace received makes her a herald at once.
'My meat is to do the will of him that sent me, and to finish his work.' His delight. To do the Father's will is His very nourishment.
'My meat is to do the will of him that sent me, and to finish his work.' His delight. To do the Father's will is His very nourishment.
'My meat is to do the will of him that sent me, and to finish his work.' His delight. To do the Father's will is His very nourishment.
'My meat is to do the will of him that sent me, and to finish his work.' His delight. To do the Father's will is His very nourishment.
Lift up your eyes, 'the fields... are white already to harvest'; one sows, another reaps. Ready harvest. Souls stand waiting to be gathered.
Lift up your eyes, 'the fields... are white already to harvest'; one sows, another reaps. Ready harvest. Souls stand waiting to be gathered.

Many Samaritans believe, first for her word, then for His own; 'this is indeed... the Saviour of the world.' Spreading faith. The witness leads them to Christ Himself.
Many Samaritans believe, first for her word, then for His own; 'this is indeed... the Saviour of the world.' Spreading faith. The witness leads them to Christ Himself.

Many Samaritans believe, first for her word, then for His own; 'this is indeed... the Saviour of the world.' Spreading faith. The witness leads them to Christ Himself.
He goes into Galilee, where the people receive Him. A welcome. Those who saw His works gladly receive Him.
He goes into Galilee, where the people receive Him. A welcome. Those who saw His works gladly receive Him.
He goes into Galilee, where the people receive Him. A welcome. Those who saw His works gladly receive Him.
A nobleman begs for his dying son; 'Go thy way; thy son liveth'; he believed the word and went. Faith in the word. He trusts Christ's bare promise.

A nobleman begs for his dying son; 'Go thy way; thy son liveth'; he believed the word and went. Faith in the word. He trusts Christ's bare promise.
His servants meet him, the son healed from that very hour; 'himself believed, and his whole house.' Confirmed faith. The fulfilment deepens belief in all his house.
